summary: Reina enters a competitive match against an opponent known as Mister Moai, successfully breaking his win streak. During the fight, she utilizes a powerful mindset skill that catches onlookers off guard and secures her victory. Despite the intensity of the match, Reina manages to overcome the challenge, impressing the audience and her observers.
key_moments: Reina steps up to challenge Mister Moai to break his win streak.
Reina activates the Slaughterer Mindset skill during the match.
Reina defeats Mister Moai, surprising the crowd with her hidden strength.
